blocks.content: Ready to create your own lessons? Here's what you need to do:
1. Download the latest em3k release from GitHub
2. Unzip the files to a folder on your computer
3. Copy the sample lesson folder and rename it to your topic
4. Edit the manifest.json to define your lesson structure
5. Create your lesson page JSON files using the block system
6. Update the root config.json to point to your new lesson
The following lessons will walk you through each of these steps in detail. Let's take the quiz to test your understanding so far!
